creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
> Doesn't "MPM_EVENT=on" make apache threaded too, requiring ZTS=on in PHP?

I'm not sure about this. I stopped using apache many years ago after discovering nginx. So i'm not having this much experience with apache left. But based on the documentation i would think so.

Also please note the comment from /usr/ports/Mk/Uses/php.mk:
# If you are building PHP-based ports in poudriere(8) with ZTS enabled,
# add WITH_MPM=event to /etc/make.conf to prevent build failures.

Greetings,
Torsten
